title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.181 - Parks, requests for federal aid, notice to be given department
text:
226.181.  Parks, requests for federal aid, notice to be given department. — Any agency, department or political subdivision of the state shall, at least thirty days prior to requesting any federal funds or any other federal assistance for a public park or recreation area, notify the Missouri transportation department of such request.
(L. 1995 S.B. 212)
